category_sources: source_facts.description says this is a numerical library for C and C++; official GNU GSL page describes GSL as a numerical library for C/C++ programmers.
display_name_sources: Official GNU GSL page title is “GSL - GNU Scientific Library”; source_facts.name is gsl.
docs_sources: Official GNU GSL page links to the online GSL Reference Manual in HTML under its Documentation section.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GNU GSL page says development is hosted on Savannah and gives the git clone URL git://git.savannah.gnu.org/gsl.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says numerical library for C and C++; official GNU GSL page lists mathematical routines such as random number generators, special functions, least-squares fitting, and other numerical areas.
